unresolved_mentions: The chronology refers to 'a financial advisor' at the June 18, 2014 meeting without naming that advisor.
The chronology mentions 'another bidder' in B019 that suggested a range of $80.00 to $85.00 per share; it is unclear whether this is one of the two bidders later combined into Bidder 3.

The chronology states 15 financial buyers signed confidentiality agreements and six parties submitted indications of interest, but the identities of most bidders other than the Buyer Group, Bidder 2 and Bidder 3 are not disclosed.

Longview is described both as an activist stockholder advocating for a sale and as part of the eventual Buyer Group; the chronology does not clearly re-label Longview as a bidder actor during the process before the final agreement.
